creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

an update to 20210127.

ChangeLog: https://github.com/jnsh/arc-theme/releases/tag/20210127

Package Changes:

- Switched to meson because the old one gets removed soon.
- Removed a patch that sets Adwaita as default cursor.
- Build now all desktops in one + cinnamon is back and working.
- Specified Gnome-Shell, Cinnamoon and gtk3 version by hand (This allows to build - The complete port without using the environments themselves as build dependency)
- Removed optipng as builtdep for now because it's not currently used when building with meson.
- Removed x11-themes/gnome-themes-extra as rundep because its was only needed before GNOME version 3.28

Many thanks in advance :)
